**File:** `linkedin-global-talent-report-2026.md`

## 10. SHRM: 2026 Recruiting Executives — Priorities and Perspectives
**File:** `shrm-recruiting-executives-priorities-2026.md`  
**Data:** 298 heads of recruiting surveyed Jan 21–Feb 4, 2026 via SHRM Voice of Work Research Panel. Required to lead their org's recruitment function. Multiple industries, sectors, sizes, and locations. Data not weighted.  

## 11. SHRM — 2026 Talent Trends Report: Data-Driven Insights for the Future of Work
**File:** `shrm-talent-trends-2026.md`  
**Data:** 2,094 HR professionals surveyed via SHRM Voice of Work Research Panel, Feb 9–20, 2026  
**Published:** 2026-05-05  
**Best for:** Recruiting difficulty benchmarks, skills gap quantification, talent strategy alternatives to external hiring, retention pressure scope

## 12. iCIMS + Aptitude Research — The Definitive Guide to AI Adoption in Talent Acquisition
**File:** `icims-aptitude-ai-adoption-ta-2026.md`  
**Data:** 400+ U.S. talent acquisition leaders and practitioners surveyed  
**Published:** 2026-04-30  
**Best for:** AI adoption maturity in TA, agentic AI adoption rates, candidate vs. employer AI usage gap, recruiter role transformation

**File:** `ashby-recruiter-productivity-2025.md`  
**Data:** 109M+ applications, 247K jobs, January 2021–March 2026  
**Published:** 2025-01-07  

## 14. iCIMS — May 2026 Workforce Report: AI Reshaping Early Career Hiring
**File:** `icims-may-2026-workforce-report.md`  
**Data:** 3M+ global platform users, 691M+ candidate profiles; survey of entry-level job seekers (ages 18–24)  
**Published:** 2026-05-21  
**Best for:** Entry-level hiring gap, April 2026 labor market snapshot, Gen Z AI attitudes, candidate confidence benchmarks

## 15. NACE — Job Outlook 2026 Spring Update
**File:** `nace-job-outlook-2026-spring-update.md`  
**Data:** 185 employer respondents (142 NACE members + 43 non-members); survey Feb 12 – Mar 17, 2026  
**Published:** 2026-04-27  
**Best for:** College graduate hiring projections, skills-based hiring adoption rates, employer sentiment on graduate preparedness, internship value benchmarks

## ASHBY DEEP-DIVE REPORTS (multi-year data)

## 16. Ashby — Did Hiring Pick Up in 2025?
**File:** `ashby-2025-hiring-trends.md`  
**Data:** Fixed cohort of hundreds of companies tracked across 8 consecutive quarters  
**Best for:** 2025 hiring recovery signals, company-size divergence, EMEA vs. North America comparison

## 17. Ashby — Does AI Notetaking Improve Feedback Forms?
**File:** `ashby-ai-notetaking.md`  
**Published:** 2025-12-12  
**Best for:** AI notetaking ROI, scorecard submission speed, feedback quality improvement

## 18. Ashby — Are Jobs Asking More Application Questions?
**File:** `ashby-application-questions.md`  
**Data:** 4.8M+ applications  
**Published:** 2025-03-18  
**Best for:** Application question trends, long-form question prevalence, completion behavior

## 19. Ashby — How Many Hires Come From Inbound?
**File:** `ashby-inbound-hires.md`  
**Data:** ~250,000 hires  
**Best for:** Source-of-hire benchmarks, inbound vs. sourcing vs. referral split, company size patterns

## 20. Ashby — What Is a Recruiter's Capacity?
**File:** `ashby-recruiter-capacity.md`  
**Data:** 26M+ interactions; 100K jobs  
**Best for:** Recruiter and coordinator capacity benchmarks, company-size comparison, peak load patterns

## 21. Ashby — Applications Per Job Report
**File:** `ashby-applications-per-job.md`  
**Data:** ~13M applications (original); updated through January 2024  
**Best for:** Application volume trends, first-week spike patterns, business vs. technical role comparison

## 22. Ashby — Candidate Sourcing Report
**File:** `ashby-candidate-sourcing.md`  
**Data:** 500K+ email sequences  
**Best for:** Sourcing email benchmarks, sequence structure, AI personalization lift, role-by-role sourcing patterns

## 23. Ashby — How Common Are Ghost Jobs?
**File:** `ashby-ghost-jobs.md`  
**Data:** 22,000+ job postings  
**Best for:** Job fill rates, unfilled position analysis, ghost job prevalence in real hiring data

## 24. Ashby — Offer Acceptance Rates Report
**File:** `ashby-offer-acceptance-rates.md`  
**Data:** 230K applications reaching offer stage  
**Best for:** OAR benchmarks by function and industry, time-in-offer-stage norms, rescission rates

## 25. Ashby — Recruiting Coordination Report
**File:** `ashby-recruiting-coordination.md`  
**Data:** 2.8M candidates with interviews; 5.1M+ interview events  
**Published:** 2024-10-22  
**Best for:** Coordinator staffing benchmarks, scheduling speed, scorecard submission rates, direct booking impact

## 26. Ashby — Are Referred Candidates More Likely to Be Hired?
**File:** `ashby-referrals.md`  
**Data:** 38M+ applications across 93K jobs  
**Best for:** Referral conversion rates vs. other sources, application source breakdown, offer rate trends

## 27. Ashby — Candidate Experience Surveys Report
**File:** `ashby-candidate-experience-surveys.md`  
**Data:** 67,400 survey requests; 11,900 responses  
**Best for:** Candidate NPS benchmarks, survey response rates, experience by hiring stage and outcome

## Quick Reference: Key Numbers Across Reports

| Metric | Benchmark | Source | Year |
|--------|-----------|--------|------|
| Hiring growth YoY 2026 | +8.3% (still 30% below 2021) | Gem | 2026 |
| Applications per recruiter vs. 2021 | +93% | Gem | 2026 |
| Hires per recruiter vs. 2021 | -43% | Gem | 2026 |
| Offer acceptance rate | 82% (highest since 2021) | Gem | 2026 |
| Sourced candidates: hiring likelihood | 8x more than other channels | Gem | 2026 |
| Interviews per hire increase vs. 2021 | +33% overall | Gem | 2026 |
| TA leaders planning to use AI | 84% | Korn Ferry | 2026 |
| TA leaders adding autonomous AI agents | 52% | Korn Ferry | 2026 |
| Companies replacing roles with AI | 43% | Korn Ferry | 2026 |
| Office mandates hinder recruiting | 52% of TA leaders | Korn Ferry | 2026 |
| Remote roles easier to fill | 73% of TA leaders | Korn Ferry | 2026 |
| Critical thinking = #1 hiring priority | 73% of TA leaders | Korn Ferry | 2026 |
| Candidates using AI for resumes | 71% | HireVue | 2026 |
| HR teams using AI regularly | 77% | HireVue | 2026 |
| Hiring teams with full AI confidence | 41% | HireVue | 2026 |
| Hires per recruiter (business) | 5.0 (5-yr high) | Ashby | Q1 2026 |
| Hires per recruiter (technical) | 3.8 | Ashby | Q1 2026 |
| Applications per hire increase | +182% | Ashby | 2021→2024 |
| Recruiter capacity (peak, jobs/week) | 14 (recruiters), 27 (coordinators) | Ashby | 2024–2025 |
| Scheduling speed advantage (Ashby vs. legacy) | 40% faster | Ashby | 2024 |
| Direct booking scheduling lift | 33% faster | Ashby | 2024 |
| Scorecard submission within 24hrs (AI notetaking) | 70% vs. 66% | Ashby | 2025 |
| AI notetaking: scorecard word count lift | +44% | Ashby | 2025 |
| Offer acceptance rate (3-yr avg) | 78% | Ashby | 2021–2023 |
| OAR: business roles | 84% | Ashby | 2021–2024 |
| OAR: technical roles | 73% | Ashby | 2021–2024 |
| Inbound share of all hires | 52% (Q2 2025 high) | Ashby | 2025 |
| Referral application-to-interview rate | 40% | Ashby | 2021–2024 |
| Sourcing email open rate | 86% | Ashby | 2022–2024 |
| Sourcing email reply rate | 19.6% | Ashby | 2022–2024 |
| AI personalization reply rate lift | +46% | Ashby | 2022–2024 |
| Job fill rate (overall) | 82% | Ashby | 2024 |
| Job fill rate (enterprise) | 89% | Ashby | 2024 |
| Application questions per job: growth | nearly doubled | Ashby | 2021–2024 |
| Long-form questions in applications | 46.8% of jobs | Ashby | 2024 |
| Candidate NPS average | 37 | Ashby | 2022–2023 |
| Candidate NPS (hired) | 85 | Ashby | 2022–2023 |
| Candidate NPS (active, 2+ stages) | 28 | Ashby | 2022–2023 |
| Time-to-fill 2026 (Employ) | 63.5 days (down from 67.7) | Employ | 2026 |
| First-year turnover | 12.1% (down from 23.7%) | Employ | 2025 |
| Candidate experience score avg | 2.9/5 | Employ | 2026 |
| Recruiters planning to increase AI use | 93% | LinkedIn | 2026 |
| People globally looking for new role | 52% | LinkedIn | 2026 |
| TA leaders: AI efficiency = top priority | 84% | iCIMS | 2026 |
| Execs expecting generative AI for JDs | 92% | SHRM | 2026 |
| HR professionals facing full-time recruiting challenges | ~70% | SHRM Talent Trends | 2026 |
| Recruiting harder than a year ago | 53% of HR pros | SHRM Talent Trends | 2026 |
| HR pros struggling to hire for roles requiring new skills | 77% | SHRM Talent Trends | 2026 |
| Job rotation programs effective at closing talent gaps | 93% (but <25% use them) | SHRM Talent Trends | 2026 |
| Companies using AI in TA in some capacity | 69% | iCIMS + Aptitude Research | 2026 |
| Companies using AI broadly across hiring | 18% | iCIMS + Aptitude Research | 2026 |
| Candidates using AI in job search | 74% | iCIMS + Aptitude Research | 2026 |
| TA leaders unclear on AI vs. automation difference | 58% | iCIMS + Aptitude Research | 2026 |
| Companies using/planning agentic AI in TA | 46% | iCIMS + Aptitude Research | 2026 |
| Entry-level job openings (April 2026 vs. baseline) | +18% (apps down 9%) | iCIMS May 2026 | 2026 |
| Gen Z: AI changing entry-level roles | 78% believe so | iCIMS May 2026 | 2026 |
| Entry-level job seekers: very confident in career | 19% | iCIMS May 2026 | 2026 |
| Entry-level job seekers: job security = top factor | 44% | iCIMS May 2026 | 2026 |
| Employers using skills-based hiring | 70% (up from 65%) | NACE Spring Update | 2026 |
| College graduate hiring growth (Class of 2026) | +5.6% (revised from +1.6% in fall) | NACE Spring Update | 2026 |
| Large employer (5,000+) hiring increase | +8.7% | NACE Spring Update | 2026 |
